english_text:
Logic
CONCRETE
Physical World
SUPPORTS
Faith, Beliefs, Emotions
ABSTRACT
alt_text: Teaching diagram contrasting the concrete and abstract: a brain (labelled 'Logic', 'CONCRETE') is double-arrowed with an image of the Earth ('Physical World'); a large blue 'SUPPORTS' arrow leads downward to a heart shape containing 'Faith, Beliefs, Emotions' (labelled 'ABSTRACT'), which is double-arrowed with the calligraphic word 'الله' (Allah).
notes: Pedagogical diagram: logic supports faith — the concrete brain understanding the physical world supports the abstract heart's relationship with God.
